name: Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the dry milk and three cups of water. Set aside.
2. Heat the remaining three cups of water to boiling. Add the rice. Return to a boil and cook, covered, for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat and add the milk mixture, sugar, and butter. Stir until combined.
4. Cook at medium heat for an additional 30 minutes, stirring often.
5. Add the vanilla.
6. Pour into a bowl. Sprinkle with cinnamon and nutmeg. Let cool to serving temperature. Serve warm.
